value.body:
## Outcome

Cycle becomes a usable local-first ticketing system for developers and small teams, with local agents able to plan, execute, report, and help triage work directly from tickets.

## Roadmap structure

This epic groups the product roadmap into six workstreams:

- Production-ready ticketing core
- Agent execution and automation
- Planning, boards, and views
- Collaboration, sync, and repository operations
- Backend, API, and data reliability
- Desktop UX, packaging, and quality

## Existing work to preserve

Existing tickets already cover useful pieces of this roadmap and should be treated as in-flight or supporting work, not recreated:

- `UKN-7YDK9` structured agent workflow for ticket assignment execution
- `UKN-135AP` sidebar collapse toggle
- `UKN-66FC7` inbox read-on-open behavior
- `UKN-8X352`, `UKN-AM140`, `UKN-7TNRR`, `UKN-DKMCZ` cleanup tickets
- completed API/schema/inbox/history work that should remain regression-protected

## Acceptance criteria

- Each workstream has shippable tickets with clear outcomes and acceptance criteria.
- Product features are ordered around a usable end-to-end workflow: open repo, create/triage work, assign agents, review output, sync/share state, and recover from failures.
- Roadmap tickets avoid duplicating already-active tickets unless they explicitly extend them.

frontmatter.title: Roadmap: Make Cycle a functional local-agent ticketing product

value.title: Roadmap: Make Cycle a functional local-agent ticketing product
